sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_series_data (event_time DateTime, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
INSERT INTO time_series_data (event_time, value) VALUES (now(), 42.0), (now() - interval 1 hour, 35.5);
SELECT event_time, value FROM time_series_data WHERE event_time >= now() - interval 2 hour;
UPDATE time_series_data SET value = value * 1.1 WHERE event_time < now() - interval 1 hour;
SELECT toStartOfHour(event_time) AS hour, avg(value) AS average_value FROM time_series_data GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour;
